about.name: Jonathan Lisowski
about.bioA: I am a solutions-driven Audio Engineer, Web Developer and Software Engineer with a 10-year track record of optimizing production workflows and engineering automation tools for a high-volume Hollywood production music company. Combining a strong foundational background in studio engineering, asset management and quality control (QC) with advanced modern development methodologies, I specialize in building tools and automating complex workflows.
about.bioB: A lifelong learner dedicated to continuous technical advancement, I have reinforced my hands-on enterprise experience with rigorous specialized coursework in JavaScript, frontend architectures, and backend systems through UCLA, Coursera, Frontend Masters, and Boot.dev. I’m at my best when I’m connecting teams, solving problems on the fly, and keeping projects moving. Currently based in Oakland County, Michigan, I am seeking to leverage my operational experience and technical expertise into a full-time Web Development role.

certs.name: Getting Started with Git and GitHub
